archetype: 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast with an Editorial Tech Twist)

fonts.usage: Headings (H1, H2, H3) - Authoritative, brutalist yet elegant
Overlines, labels, small tech specs, stats numbers - Engineer feel
Body text - Clean, highly readable geometric sans

scales.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl+ lg:text-7xl font-black tracking-tighter leading-none
scales.overline: text-xs md:text-sm font-mono uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-[#FF5722]

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. Avoid standard centered columns. Embrace asymmetry and The Bento Grid (Tetris Mode A).

motion_and_interaction.scrolling: Lenis smooth scroll is MANDATORY for weight and premium feel.
motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Buttons lift (-translate-y-1), borders glow faintly with primary color.
motion_and_interaction.reveal: Framer Motion staggered reveals on scroll (opacity 0 -> 1, y: 20 -> 0).

components_strategy.buttons: Square or very slightly rounded (rounded-sm). High contrast. Primary: Tangerine background with black text. Secondary: Transparent with tangerine border and white text.
components_strategy.cards: Minimalist 'Tracing Beam' or subtle 'Glassmorphism' on dark backgrounds. 1px borders (#333333).
components_strategy.navigation: Sticky glass header (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0F0F0F]/70) with 1px bottom border. Left-aligned logo, right-aligned CTA.
components_strategy.forms: Shadcn based. Dark inputs, 1px borders, tangerine focus rings.

sections_blueprint.name: Header
sections_blueprint.layout: Sticky top, crystal glassmorphism, flexible row.
sections_blueprint.content: Logo 'BLAYAKE' in Cabinet Grotesk, Nav links, 'Book a Call' primary button.

sections_blueprint.name: Hero
sections_blueprint.layout: Grid 12-col. Left 7 cols: Content. Right 5 cols: Large abstract visual.
sections_blueprint.content: Overline: 'AI SYSTEMS AGENCY'. H1: 'We engineer autonomous growth.' Body: 'Stop doing manual work. We build bespoke AI systems that scale your operations, create content, and close deals 24/7.' CTAs: 'Book a Call' & 'Explore Work'. Right: Black/Orange abstract glass image.

sections_blueprint.name: Marquee
sections_blueprint.layout: Full width, slow scroll, JetBrains Mono font.
sections_blueprint.content: AI AUTOMATION + CUSTOM LLMS + PREDICTIVE ANALYTICS + WORKFLOW OPTIMIZATION

sections_blueprint.name: Services / Capabilities
sections_blueprint.content: AI Automation (col-span-8), AI Content Systems (col-span-4), Custom AI Chatbots (col-span-4), Web Development (col-span-8). Dark cards with 1px border. Hover effect: subtle orange glow.

sections_blueprint.name: Stats
sections_blueprint.content: 150+ Projects (col), 98% Satisfaction (col), 10x Automation (col). Numbers in huge JetBrains Mono text-primary, labels in Manrope text-secondary.

sections_blueprint.name: Process
sections_blueprint.layout: Grid Borders ('Technical Look'). 4 columns on desktop, 1 on mobile.
sections_blueprint.content: Discover -> Design -> Build -> Deploy. Border-r and border-b for separation.

sections_blueprint.name: Case Studies
sections_blueprint.layout: Vertical stacked list with hover image reveal (editorial portfolio style), or a simple 2-column grid.
sections_blueprint.content: 3 Case Studies highlighting the problem/solution. Use the abstract data images as covers.

sections_blueprint.name: Testimonials
sections_blueprint.content: 3 Testimonials emphasizing ROI and automation success. Use professional avatars.

sections_blueprint.name: FAQ
sections_blueprint.content: Shadcn Accordion. 1px bottom border, no background.

sections_blueprint.name: Contact / Book a Call
sections_blueprint.layout: Grid 12-col. Left 5 cols: 'Ready to Automate?' massive text. Right 7 cols: Shadcn Form connected to MongoDB.
sections_blueprint.content: Form fields: Name, Email, Company, Pain Point. Submit button.

sections_blueprint.name: Footer
sections_blueprint.content: Left: Links. Bottom: 'BLAYAKE' taking up full width in text-[15vw] Cabinet Grotesk font.

image_urls.description: Abstract black and orange glass geometry to fit the high-contrast editorial tech theme.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Do not use generic Inter, Roboto, or Space Grotesk. Add Cabinet Grotesk, JetBrains Mono, and Manrope links to index.html and configure in Tailwind.
CRITICAL: Do not use purple/blue gradients or generic 'tech' blues. Stick strictly to the Obsidian/Charcoal and Tangerine (#FF5722) palette.
CRITICAL: Avoid standard centered columns. Embrace asymmetry (e.g. text left, image right, bento grid sizes mixed 8-4/4-8).
Ensure Lenis smooth scroll is implemented for the premium high-end feel.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, links, and form inputs for testing.
Ensure backend integration uses standard fetch/axios calls for the MongoDB-connected 'Book a Call' form.
